title: NBRI Recruitment 2026 - Walk-in-Interview for Project Associate II Posts
description: The CSIR National Botanical Research Institute (NBRI) has announced the official notification for the recruitment of Project Associate II Jobs. Those candidates who have qualified in the B.E/ B.Tech, M.E/ M.Tech, and M.Sc can grab this chance and apply for the NBRI Recruitment 2026 . Here, we included the age limit, selection process, salary structure, education details, application fee, and how to apply for these posts. If you're looking for more, here is a list of the Government Jobs in 202...
